steps.description: Click the blue "Start" button in the center of the Contact Exporter App welcome screen within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Accept" button on the Microsoft permissions request dialog to grant app permissions.
Click on the "Search for a name" input field within the Contact Table section of the contact-exporterdev app in Microsoft Teams web interface.
Type #text:testAdmin into the Contact Table search input field on the contact-exporterdev page within Microsoft Teams (web).
Click the "testAdmin" contact suggestion in the Contact Table search dropdown within the contact-exporterdev app on Microsoft Teams web.
Click the "testAdmin" name chip in the search field of the Contact Table within the Microsoft Teams web app interface, highlighting a selected search term for filtering contact results.
Type #text:"testAdmin" into the Contact Table search input field in the contact-exporterdev app on Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "testAdmin" contact suggestion (email: haolong@xbdw.onmicrosoft.com) in the contact search dropdown within the Contact Table section of the Microsoft Teams web app.
Press the End key while the "Search for a name" input in the Contact Table section of Microsoft Teams (web) is focused.
Click the "Export Contact Table to Excel" button at the bottom right of the contact-exporterlocal tab in the Microsoft Teams web app interface.
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to close the Microsoft Teams web application tab displaying the "contact-exporterdev" interface.
